vendors.name: C Market Coffee
vendors.description: C Market Coffee takes its name from the global “C Market”—the traditional exchange where Arabica coffee is traded as a commodity. We’ve reimagined that concept for today, transforming it into a modern marketplace where quality, people, and purpose come together. We offer more than just a cup of coffee. At C Market, we roast high-quality beans in-house and pair them with fresh, thoughtfully crafted dishes—designed for those who value both taste and time.Our café blends fast-paced lifestyles with slow-roasted coffee and gourmet meals, all served in a welcoming, design-forward space. Whether you’re grabbing a quick bite or lingering over a handcrafted latte, we make it easy to enjoy luxury every day. In a world that moves fast, we focus on balance: quick service without compromise, and convenience without sacrificing quality. Morning coffee, midday meetings, or a moment of calm—C Market is your everyday destination. We’re more than a café. We’re a space of exchange—of ideas, culture, and connection. That’s the modern market we stand for.

vendors.description: We are a specialty coffee shop and micro-bakery nestled inside a historic heritage building in Yaletown. Our goal is to create a welcoming, cozy community hub where guests feel at home, and quality is at the heart of everything we do. As a full coffee roastery, we focus on precision and consistency in every cup. Our baked goods are all Czech-inspired and made in-house, reflecting the heritage of our owner and much of our team from the Czech Republic.

vendors.description: Rocky Mtn Chocolate began in 1988 in Whistler, BC, growing from a small family dream into one of Canada’s most beloved chocolate brands with over 45 locations nationwide. We’re known for handcrafted, small-batch creations made fresh in every store—from boxed chocolates to our famous caramel apples. Proudly Canadian since day one, we continue to celebrate quality, creativity, and the joy of sharing exceptional confections.

From the way we craft and serve to the pace we keep each day, everything is designed to help you pause, enjoy something simple, and carry a sense of balance with you. Every cup is made with intention, measured, mindful, and rooted in quality – while we strive to make specialty coffee welcoming and approachable for everyone.

Founded and led by a Canadian team, Sweet7 blends fresh fruits with advanced tea-brewing techniques to craft high-quality beverages free from artificial flavourings. Rooted in Asian traditions yet inspired by Vancouver’s creative culture, we’re excited to bring our first tea-infused hot chocolate creations to the festival this year.

Known for its artisanal approach, the bakery specializes in hand-crafted breads, pies, sandwiches and other baked goods made with high-quality, locally sourced ingredients. The café has become a community favourite, offering both delicious pastries and a cozy, welcoming atmosphere for locals and visitors alike. With a focus on traditional baking techniques, Tartine has built a strong reputation in Vancouver’s thriving food scene.

Known for handcrafted chocolates, buttery pastries, and rich hot chocolates that push the limits, Temper brings precision and playfulness to every creation. This year’s festival lineup is no exception, indulgent, cheeky, and delightfully rebellious.

Step by step, we continue to strive for perfection driven by our love and passion for food and people.” – Thomas Haas

vendors.name: To Live For Bakery & Cafe
vendors.description: To Live For Bakery is an independent, purpose-driven bakery on a mission to prove that the future of baking is plant-based. Flaky croissants, cakes, cookies, loaves, espresso and so much more are available daily at their East Van brick-and-mortar cafe that opened in November of 2022. Established in 2011 as a wholesale bakery, they transitioned away from animal ingredients a few years into their journey after learning what happens to animals in the dairy and egg industries. Through trial and error, they believe the few ingredient swaps they’ve made have led to even more delicious products.

vendors.name: Union Market
vendors.description: Union Market is a cozy, vibrant hub in one of Vancouver’s oldest neighbourhoods, where history meets modern flavour. Run by a passionate team of locals, we serve freshly baked goods, the city’s best sourdough, locally sourced essentials, and coffee from a rotating line of Canadian roasters — plus our very own house-made syrups. We’re also in love with sweet treats. More than anything, Union Market is about slowing down, connecting with neighbours, and enjoying the little joys of daily life.

vendors.name: Uno Gelato
vendors.description: At Uno Gelato, you’ll discover the exquisite taste of true artisan gelato — handcrafted by a passionate team of local craftsmen and women dedicated to perfection.You won’t find bubblegum or artificial flavours here. Instead, you’ll enjoy beloved year-round classics alongside inspired seasonal creations, all made with the finest natural ingredients. From Vancouver Island Sea Salt and Avalon Dairy milk to the freshest local fruits and herbs, every scoop is a celebration of quality, authenticity, and flavour.Uno Gelato it’s a sensory experience you won’t forget.

vendors.name: Uprising Breads Bakery
vendors.description: Uprising Breads Bakery Café is a familiar destination and a favourite meeting spot in the vibrant Commercial Drive neighbourhood of East Vancouver. We bake everything on site, early every morning. We offer that full selection of familiar home baking that will make you want, “one of everything please!”Our bright and cheerful, comfy-cozy café provides indoor and outdoor seating with a full coffee service. Lunchtime offerings include homemade soups and salads, hot savoury items and a variety of sandwiches, made on our own fresh baked breads.Like the locals say: “Meet you at the Uprising!”

vendors.description: Since opening in 1956, the Vancouver Aquarium has connected more than 40 million people from around the world to our oceans and inspired them to take action to address key threats. Located in Stanley Park, the Vancouver Aquarium is home to hundreds of incredible species. The Vancouver Aquarium is a fully accredited member of Association of Zoos and Aquariums (AZA), Alliance of Marine Mammal Parks and Aquariums (AMMPA), Canada’s Accredited Zoos and Aquariums (CAZA), and Humane Conservation Certified by American Humane.

Everything is made in house and baked fresh every morning. They source ingredients locally whenever possible and enjoy supporting local businesses. Find the classics in store daily or visit on the weekend for something new and seasonal.

vendors.name: YUM SWEET SHOP – NEW
vendors.description: Michael, owner of YUM SWEET SHOP, loves all things sweet. The curated candy and sweets from around the globe will leave you drooling. Dessert reigns supreme at YUM and the Hot Chocolate creations do not disappoint. Combining YUM’s love for caramel, coffee, candy and ice cream, the hot chocolate creations will set your taste binds into overdrive.

locations.hours: Noon to 10:00 p.m., Daily

drinks.name: Campfire Cocoa
drinks.description:
Toasted marshmallow and chocolate blend together in this hot chocolate with a velvety topping of toffee-flavoured cold foam.

Accompanied by a mini brioche doughnut filled with chocolate pastry cream, dipped in toffee glaze, and topped with a toasted marshmallow.

drinks.name: Raspberry Zing Cocoa
drinks.description:
A creamy white chocolate and raspberry cocoa with a spark of pink peppercorn berry.

Served with a mini brioche doughnut, filled with raspberry jam, dipped in a white chocolate glaze, topped with raspberries and pink peppercorn.

drinks.name: Angel on Cloud 9
drinks.description:
Hot white chocolate infused with pomegranate, cherry compote, and port, crowned with an angel-hair mousse angel cake sitting on a torched meringue halo. A sophisticated indulgence that tastes like a blissful delight.

Paired with a Figgy Ume Cruffin: butter-flaked cruffin filled with fig and ume plum reduction, finished with spun angel hair. A golden bite of East-meets-West serenity.

drinks.name: Brie My Swiss Valentine
drinks.description:
Hot bittersweet cocoa entwined with molten brie and Swiss, torched cheddar brûlée and passion-mango marshmallow. A sultry twist where fondue meets dessert.

Served alongside a Pear Brûlée Blue Cheese Tart: caramelized pear over whipped blue cheese infused with cinnamon and candied ginger bits on flaky puff pastry. Sweet, smoky, and quietly sophisticated.

drinks.name: Chiikawa Mogumogu Matcha
drinks.description:
Uji Kyoto matcha latte made with Callebaut white chocolate and sweet potato puree.

On the side, a spiced red bean chocolate truffle.

Gluten free friendly. Dairy-free/vegan options available upon request.

drinks.name: Keeping Warm Under the Kotatsu
drinks.description:
Japanese mikan mandarin orange juice with okaki rice crackers and dark chocolate.

Served alongside a hojicha and sea salt chocolate truffle.

Gluten-free friendly. Dairy-free/vegan options available upon request.

drinks.name: Miso Moon
drinks.description:
Toasty houjicha and dark, silky chocolate come together in this cozy winter cup, topped with fluffy cardamom whipped cream and a miso caramel drizzle for the perfect balance of sweet and umami warmth.

Served with a cardamom cookie.

Dairy-free or vegan option available upon request.

drinks.name: Pom Noir
drinks.description:
Smooth dark chocolate meets tangy pomegranate, topped with a bright yuzu whipped cream and a hint of aromatic rosemary for a refreshing twist on a winter classic.

Paired with a cinnamon cookie.

Contains nuts. Dairy-free or vegan option available upon request.

drinks.name: Butterscotch Budino Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A luscious toasted sugar hot chocolate infused with brown butter warmth.

Paired with a delicate shortbread biscuit featuring subtle amaretti notes.

drinks.name: Love Potion Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A dark chocolate elixir steeped with fragrant cardamom.

Served with a hand cut, artisanal rose scented marshmallow.

drinks.name: Dark Sesame Choccy
drinks.description:
Meet Obsidian Dark Choccy — our deep, roasty take on hot chocolate. Belgian dark chocolate, your milk of choice, and topped with a silky layer of house-made black sesame cold foam. Roasty. Toasty. Choccy.

Each Obsidian Dark Choccy includes a serving of our freshly made Nama Dark Chocolates. Silky, rich, and slow-melted for a naturally soft texture; a melt-in-your-mouth bite to deepen the whole dark chocolate experience.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: White Mocha Snow
drinks.description:
Snow day in a cup: Belgian white chocolate and AVIK espresso, milk of choice, topped with our house-made vanilla cold foam, and a snowfall of white chocolate snow. White. Creamy. Snowy.

Each White Mocha Snow comes with a serving of our exclusive Nama White Chocolates. Soft, velvety, and creamy-smooth. A little snowy company to complete the white chocolate experience.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: Bak’d Birthday Brownie
drinks.description:
Treat yourself to a sweet and salty caramel dark hot chocolate topped with salted caramel whip cream and caramel. Complete with a dark chocolate Skor rim and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt.

Served with an ooey gooey 3-oz Salted Caramel Brownie Cookie.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: Straw-Berry Sweet 16
drinks.description:
Enjoy the berry-sweet strawberry-infused white hot chocolate topped with strawberry cream whip. Complete with a white chocolate and sprinkle rim!

Served with a perfectly sweet 5-oz Strawberry Shortcake Cookie.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: Cereal Dream FM
drinks.description:
Milk-chocolate hot cocoa steeped with toasted cornflake and oat milk, finished with Okinawan kuromitsu (black-sugar syrup) for smoky caramel depth.

Served with a cornflake and brown butter sablé: a crisp butter cookie glazed with kuromitsu and a sprinkle of smoked salt.

May contain nuts and alcohol.

drinks.name: Waffle.exe
drinks.description:
Blonde-chocolate hot chocolate blended with brown butter, toasted malt, and a hint of fresh-baked bread aroma for a cozy waffle-inspired flavour.

Paired with a hōjicha financier bite: a soft roasted green tea almond cake brushed with kuromitsu for a light, buttery finish.

May contain nuts and alcohol.

drinks.name: Snack Pack Pudding Break
drinks.description:
Dark-chocolate hot chocolate blended with roasted banana and miso brown butter for a smooth, sweet-salty flavour.

Served with a banana miso financier: a soft roasted banana cake infused with miso-honey,

May contain nuts and alcohol.

drinks.name: Berry Sweet 16
drinks.description:
Milk hot chocolate with almond praline and raspberry whipped cream.

Served with a raspberry macaron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Cherry on Top
drinks.description:
Dark hot chocolate with cherry syrup and rose whipped cream.

Served with a cherry truffle.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: The IGP Emerald
drinks.description:
A luxurious blend of silky Callebaut white chocolate and roasted Sicili D.O.P. pistachios, served with a bright, tangy hint of raspberry to cut through the nutty sweetness.

Paired with house-made raspberry sorbetto served on a mini-tart.

Contains nuts. Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: The Piedmont Promise
drinks.description:
Velvety premium milk chocolate from Cluizel of Paris with roasted IGP Hazelnuts. Grounded, rich, and nutty; balanced perfectly with the bright notes of the side treat.

Paired with house-made raspberry sorbetto served on a mini-tart.

Contains nuts. Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: 16 Karat Kiss
drinks.description:
An indulgent embrace of silk-smooth milk chocolate and salted caramel, crowned with a kiss of gold. 16 Karat Kiss celebrates warmth, elegance, and comfort in every sip- rich without being overly sweet. Finished with golden whipped cream and shimmering accents, it’s a classic caramel romance reimagined for grown-up taste buds.

Served with a mini beignet with brown butter glaze and sea salt flakes. The glaze adds a nutty, caramel-like depth while the salt enhances every bite.

drinks.name: Cherry Blossom Crumble
drinks.description:
Inspired by the fleeting bloom of spring, Cherry Blossom Crumble blends tart cherry syrup with our house milk-chocolate base and a touch of salt for harmony. Topped with almond-essence whipped cream, cherry dust, and dark chocolate shavings, it’s a delicate dance between fruity brightness and chocolate warmth — elegant, nostalgic, and quietly indulgent.

Paired with a mini beignet with dark chocolate drizzle and toasted almonds.  The nutty crunch and rich chocolate echo the drink’s cherry-almond harmony.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Crush at First Sip
drinks.description:
A bold and sultry twist on comfort — Crush at First Sip blends our house milk-chocolate base with smoked honey, vanilla, and warming spices like clove, nutmeg, and cardamom. Finished with a splash of St-Rémy brandy, it’s velvety, aromatic, and irresistibly smooth. Topped with vanilla whipped cream, dark-chocolate shavings, and a pinch of sea salt, this drink flirts with your senses from the very first taste.

Served with a mini beignet with rosemary- and thyme-infused brown butter glaze. The savoury aroma and buttery depth complement the drink’s smoky, spiced notes perfectly.

Contains alcohol; café service only.

drinks.name: The Nordic Malt
drinks.description:
Dark chocolate infused with toasted rye and a touch of molasses, topped with a layer of cocoa dust.

Served with a spiced rye ginger cookie.

drinks.name: Hygge in a Mug
drinks.description:
Lightly spiced cardamom vanilla hot chocolate finished with a cinnamon heart on top.

Served with a heart-shaped cinnamon shortbread cookie.

drinks.name: Sweet 16 Party
drinks.description:
In honour of Hot Chocolate Festival’s 16th birthday, we’re celebrating with hot chocolate and cake! Indulge in our classic vanilla dark hot chocolate, made with 70.5% dark couverture chocolate. Rich, creamy, and bursting with decadent chocolate goodness! It is topped with a smooth vanilla bean whip and a shower of colourful sprinkles that shout PARTY!

Paired with a charming two-tier mini rosette birthday cake, layered with fluffy, light sponge and silky Swiss meringue buttercream and finished with a classic buttercream rosette. Make a wish and blow out the candle for the full birthday moment! Enjoy complimentary boba on us to sweeten the celebration.

drinks.name: Coco Boba Katsu
drinks.description:
A rich coconut hot chocolate made with 54.5% couverture dark chocolate, topped with a smooth layer of house-made salted coconut cold foam and a sprinkle of toasted coconut flakes.

It is paired with our playful cereal-coated “pork tonkatsu” ice cream, chocolate “gravy”, coconut sticky rice and a side of “cabbage salad” of candied young coconut shreds. Adorably kawaii, like a meal sprung straight from your favourite manga scene!

And of course, you can enjoy free boba in your hot chocolate as per usual!

Gluten-free friendly option available upon request.

drinks.name: Postcards from Japan
drinks.description:
A twist on our first year’s submission, back by popular demand. Salted white Belgian hot chocolate with a bit of salted kinako powder (roasted soybean powder). Topped with toasted house-made marshmallow cream.

Served with a liege mini mochi waffle stuffed with mochi, drizzled with white chocolate, and kinako powder.

drinks.name: Postcards from Belgium
drinks.description:
A hot chocolate made with milk and semi-sweet Callebaut chocolate. Topped with our house-made toasted marshmallow cream. Topped with cookie butter and Biscoff cookie crumble.

Paired with a warm mini liege waffle stuffed with mochi, topped with Biscoff cookie crumble and caramel.

drinks.name: What Dream Are Made Of
drinks.description:
Imagine you are 5 years old again…Imagine you get your bowl of cereal with chocolate milk, and this is the best day… We are bringing that memory back with our creation! Mixed with cereal milk, your hot chocolate will be as sweet as ever.

Served with mini croissant cereal.

Vegan and dairy-free.

drinks.name: Chick’n and Waffle. And Hot Chocolate!
drinks.description:
Half of our team here at Bonus leans more savoury than sweet, so we are bringing you the Chick’n N Waffle slider, Maple Hot Chocolate combo! The slider will be exactly that, a mini chick’n and waffle sandwich with a pickle and spicy mayo.  We have paired it with a maple-forward hot chocolate (no mayo in that one), but the smoothness of the maple will be the ideal buddy for the slider. We can’t wait for you to try it!

Vegan and dairy-free.

drinks.name: Saigon After Dark – Pho Spice 2.0
drinks.description:
Key Flavours of dark chocolate and new pho spice.

When Saigon falls asleep, its spices awaken.
Dark chocolate infused with cinnamon, star anise, black pepper… and orange zest
A midnight symphony: bold, layered, and endlessly seductive.

Served with Pâté Chaud: flaky puff pastry filled with savoury ground pork and smooth pâté — a golden, buttery blend of French craft and Vietnamese comfort.
Alternative option: Takoyaki Croissant.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: Echo of Light
drinks.description:
White chocolate, lemongrass, ginger, coconut milk, wild honey, lemon zest.

A soft echo in gold and green.
Lemongrass and wild honey shimmer through white chocolate and coconut milk, lifted by ginger and citrus zest.
The taste of light returning — quiet, bright, alive.

On the side, we’re serving Mochi Melonpan on weekends or any Moissant or Croissant of your choice. 

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: Roasted Silence
drinks.description:
Key flavours of dark chocolate, oolong and genmaicha infusion, brown butter, and sea salt.

Where warmth meets stillness.
Oolong Genmaicha and roasted rice whisper through dark chocolate and browned butter, grounded by sea salt and quiet smoke.
A meditative sip — humble, deep, and infinitely calm.

On the side, a delicate single-serve strawberry shortcake layered with soft sponge, light cream, and sweet strawberry for a fresh, comforting dessert.
Alternative options: Matcha Tiramisu or Ubemisu cake box.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: Hopping in a Minter Bunderland
drinks.description:
A decadent dark hot chocolate infused with peppermint and orange, and topped with coconut whipped cream, chocolate sauce, and a peppermint candy bunny.

Served with a mini chocolate-orange soft serve “bundae,” topped with crushed candy canes.

Dairy-free, vegan, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: Ears of Corn
drinks.description:
A buttery corn-infused dark hot chocolate topped with coconut whipped cream, sea salt, freshly ground pepper, and a mini popcorn ball bunny.

Accompanied by a mini bag of freshly popped popcorn.

Dairy-free, vegan, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: Kardashamon Season 16
drinks.description:
This cardamom dark hot chocolate with a hint of lemon is a deeply aromatic and sophisticated take on classic cocoa. Rich dark chocolate infused with warm cardamom and bright lemon zest. Silky, spiced, and perfectly balanced between cozy and refreshing.

Served with our chocolate-dipped cardamom “teabag” shortbread.

drinks.name: Hot Girl Butter
drinks.description:
This brown butter salted white hot chocolate blends a nutty browned butter, creamy white chocolate, and a hint of sea salt for the perfect balance of sweet and toasty. Rich, cozy, and irresistibly smooth — pure winter indulgence in a mug.

Paired with a brown buttered rice krispie.

drinks.name: Lil’ Choc
drinks.description:
A cozy twist on a childhood classic. This cereal milk white hot chocolate is rich, creamy, and gently sweet, made with smooth white chocolate infused with nostalgic cereal-milk flavour.

Comes with a cloud of lightly toasted vanilla meringue, then finished with a playful sprinkle of Lucky Charms for a pop of colour, crunch, and whimsy. It’s warm, comforting, and fun, like a hug in a mug with a magical finish.

drinks.name: Injeolmi White Chocolate
drinks.description:
White chocolate hot drink blended with roasted soybean powder (injeolmi) for a protein-rich, nutty, and flavorful twist.

Served alongside a white chocolate injeolmi biscotti.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Fame
drinks.description:
Our play on one of the most famous food crazes to come onto the scene in recent memory and into the spotlight. Roasted sesame tahini dark chocolate ganache steamed with coconut milk, served with a dark chocolate pistachio rim.

Paired with a Pistachio Kataifi Crunch.

Dairy-free and vegan. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Fortune
drinks.description:
Manifest riches with this golden coloured, sweet and salty white hot chocolate blended with fresh vanilla and salted duck yolk. Finished with Chantilly whip, brown sugar drizzle and gold.

Served with a house-made Fortune Cookie. Get extra lucky, and you might draw a fortune for a free pastry!

drinks.name: I Choose You!
drinks.description:
An Oranberry-inspired drink from the world of pocket monsters for fans old and new! White Chocolate infused with lemon and blueberry, topped with Chantilly and Poké-inspired decor.

Play the Gacha and find your starter! This drink is served with a mystery flavour Pokéball macaron. Will you get Grass (lemongass & lime), Water (honeyed current & sea salt) or Fire (orange peppercorn)?

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: For Good
drinks.description:
All things good and wicked coming together, this drink will leave you changed, for good ♫. Dark chocolate strawberry matcha hot chocolate, finished in a perfectly pink strawberry Chantilly, matcha drizzle and rose.

On the side, a coconut lychee macaron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: The Fluffernutter Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Dark chocolate sauce and homemade peanut butter sauce hot chocolate topped with a toasted cloud of marshmallow fluff, salted peanuts and chocolate drizzle.

Served with a dark chocolate peanut butter chip cookie.

Gluten-free. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Classic Nanaimo Bar Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A twist on the classic Nanaimo bar in a drink! Coconut syrup and dark chocolate, topped with a custard whipped cream, coconut and dark chocolate sauce.

Served with a vegan Nanaimo bar donut.

Gluten-free, vegan option available upon request.

drinks.name: Confetti Cake Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
White chocolate sauce and housemade cake batter syrup hot chocolate, topped with pink whipped cream and sprinkles.

Served with a Pink Confetti Cupcake: vanilla cake filled with rainbow sprinkles, topped with house-made buttercream.

Gluten-free.

drinks.name: Milk Chocolate Almond Mocha
drinks.description:
Milk chocolate ganache, milk, almond syrup and Moja espresso in hot chocolate, topped with chocolate whipped cream and chocolate-covered almonds.

Indulge in pure decadence with our Dolce Latte, a velvety chocolate–caramel latte crowned with a crisp stroopwafel cookie, a swirl of fresh whipped cream, and a delicate sprinkle of sea salt.

Accompanied by a stroopwafel cookie.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Black Forest Delight
drinks.description:
Cherry-infused milk with rich chocolate ganache, topped with whipped cream, a chocolate shortbread cookie, and a maraschino cherry.

Paired with chocolate shortbread.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Strawberry Snuggle Jelly Cat Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A strawberry cheesecake white hot chocolate with a graham cracker whipped cream.

Accompanied by a Jelly Cat Amusable Birthday Cake macaron – make a wish and blow out the candle! It’s an almond macaron with a vanilla bean swiss meringue buttercream and strawberry compote.

drinks.name: Food Network Fav!
drinks.description:
Inspired by one of Cassandra’s Food Network championship-winning flavours, a Pandan lime white hot chocolate with a brown butter cream cheese whipped cream, accompanied by the winning flavour-blondie style!

It’s a pandan lime blondie topped with sugar cookie crumble and candied graham cracker.

drinks.name: Chicago Cinema Duo
drinks.description:
This Chicago-style popcorn hot chocolate has house-made chocolate ganache sauce with steamed milk, popcorn-infused cheese cream, house-made Chicago-style popcorn garnish, cheddar cheese powder and sea salt. Sweet, savoury, and crunchy in every sip!

Paired with a Caramel Cheese Popcorn Cookie: a classic chewy cookie with caramel, cheddar cheese, and Chicago-style popcorn clusters.

drinks.name: Tea Time in Paris
drinks.description:
A house-made Earl Grey tea-infused chocolate sauce with steamed milk, créme brûlée cream, and caramelized sugar crust.

Accompanied by an Earl Grey Madeleine: Earl Grey tea, French-style Madeleine sponge cake, and chocolate glaze.

drinks.name: Garfield in Paradise
drinks.description:
Mango-infused hot cocoa with steamed milk, topped with coconut whip, mango dust and chocolate stripes.

Accompanied by Chocolate Lasagne.

Dairy-free or vegan option available upon request.

drinks.name: Le Chat Noir

Simple, smooth and sleek as a black cat, this black sesame- and walnut-infused hot chocolate comes topped with a one-of-a-kind kitty drawn in microfoam.

Paired with a sesame bite dipped in dark chocolate.

Contains nuts. Dairy-free or vegan option available upon request.

drinks.name: Chrysanthe-YUM
drinks.description:
Rich dark chocolate meets delicate chrysanthemum in a warm and cozy drink. A subtle, sophisticated floral hug topped with whipped cream to create the perfect balance of “not too sweet” and “just sweet enough”.

Served alongside our Chrysathe-YUM hot chocolate is a mini-heart honey chrysanthemum mochi cake. A delicate sweetness that rounds out the drink.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: The Bergamot Butterfly
drinks.description:
Rich hot chocolate infused with fragrant Earl Grey tea that delivers a perfect blend of citrusy bergamot and deep cocoa. Topped with a beautiful Butterfly Pea whipped cream, adding a final layer of airy sweetness.

Served alongside our Bergamont Butterfly Hot Chocolate is a mini-heart Earl Grey mochi cake – subtly floral and not too sweet.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: Midnight Kiss
drinks.description:
This indulgent blend of Callebaut dark chocolate and velvety coconut milk is spiked with a shot of Bols cherry brandy for a grown-up twist. Topped with whipped cream and soft grape jelly pieces to add a subtle, chewy pop of fruit in every sip, it’s rich, daring, and unapologetically extra, like a first crush after curfew.

Served with a savoury lava cheesecake tart.

Contains alcohol; non-alcoholic version available upon request. Dairy-free or vegan option also available upon request.

drinks.name: Morning Whisper
drinks.description:
This Callebaut white hot chocolate features cozy chai-spiced tea syrup and a light splash of Disaronno almond liqueur, finished with whipped cream and a scattering of brown sugar tapioca pearls, like miniature moons drifting down to make way for day. With a gentle kick of warmth, every comforting sip is the perfect calm after a Midnight Kiss.

Served with a savoury lava cheesecake tart.

Contains nuts and alcohol; non-alcoholic version available upon request.

drinks.name: Christophe Super Regno
drinks.description:
Cookie and cream infused milk hot chocolate combined with a 36% Swiss milk chocolate. Topped with a mushroom-shaped marshmallow and whipped cream.

Paired with a pretzel croissant cube.

drinks.name: Shark Attack
drinks.description:
A 70% dark chocolate with cranberry purée, topped with whipped cream and cranberry drizzle. Completed with a shark fin on top.

Served with a blue macaron with a cranberry ganache.

Contains nuts. Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: Paris Brest
drinks.description:
A rich, dark hot chocolate blended with our homemade hazelnut praliné.

Served alongside a classic Paris-Brest pastry for a touch of French tradition.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Maple Butter Kooky Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Maple butter hot chocolate topped with whipped cream, caramel sauce and maple flakes.

Accompanied by a Nun’s Fart (also called a Pet de soeur). This is a French-Canadian dessert made from pie dough, layered with brown sugar and butter. And yes, it translates to a nun’s fart!

drinks.name: Midnight Mochi Horchata
drinks.description:
A nutty horchata hot chocolate infused with a hint of black sesame, complemented by mochi ice cream on top. All components are crafted in-house.

drinks.name: The Chocoflan Dream

drinks.name: Cherry Bomb

Served with a mini almond financier.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Negroni Caldo
drinks.description:
Keeping close to our Di Beppe roots with our love for the Negroni, pairing it with an orange zesty hot chocolate for a warming, aromatic yet sophisticated winter drink.

Orange dark chocolate cookie, crunchy on the outside with a soft interior – perfect companion to our zesty Negroni Caldo.

Dine-in only. Gluten-free friendly; contains alcohol and nuts.

drinks.name: Spice Road to Rome

House-made spiced persimmon dark hot chocolate with a hint of citrus for a cozy indulgence.

Served with a candied ginger almond biscotti – well paired with spiced, fruity richness of the drink without overpowering it.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: It’s a Canadian Thing!

Served with a Sweet 16 double fudge brownie.

Served with a mini Blue Velvet Old Fashion featuring a milk chocolate old-fashioned donut with a hint of blueberry and cream cheese frosting.

Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: Sticky Business – Sticky Toffee Pudding
drinks.description:
Featuring Earl Grey and date-infused steamed milk with Callebaut milk hot chocolate, drizzled with a house-made caramel.

Served with a mini Sticky Toffee Pudding doughnut.

Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: This Is Not Matcha (But Better, Toasty, and Still Green)

Paired with a black cocoa stroopwafel.

drinks.name: Holy Smokes!
drinks.description:
A 70% wood-smoked dark chocolate drinking chocolate and a hint of smoked sea salt.

Served with graham cracker chocolate bark.

Dairy-free and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: Zest Intentions
drinks.description:
Lemongrass and chili-infused 70% dark chocolate drinking chocolate.

Served with ginger shortbread.

Dairy-free, vegan, and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: Exotic Bramble
drinks.description:
The depth of ripe organic BC blackberries melds with dark hot chocolate, a hint of orange and an exotic twist of star anise, topped with coconut whipping cream and blackberry drizzle. Refined sugar free!

Served with a chewy, melt-in-your-mouth blackberry thumbprint oatmeal cookie.

drinks.name: Sweet Green Duo
drinks.description:
Green tea lovers unite! The naturally chocolate toasted undertones of organic Hojicha tea melt into our rich milk chocolate base. Topped with coconut whipping cream. Refined sugar free.

Served with a fudgie matcha blondie.

Dairy-free, vegan, organic, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: Tira-Mess-Su
drinks.description:
A set of 3 components consists of a creamy mascarpone cup, a rich, dark & sweet chocolate and a house-made, handcrafted tiramisu ball rolled in cocoa powder. This concept represents a reimagined drink-dessert where you could either add mascarpone and the tiramisu ball to cream up your chocolate, or enjoy your cup of chocolate while snacking on the tiramisu ball. Every combination lets you savour your treat and discover new, balanced flavours.

Served with a traditional Madeleine.

Takeout available but dine-in recommended for a full experience.

drinks.name: EggQuisite Cocoa
drinks.description:
Hot Chocolate… but a Sphere of hot chocolate that bursts open?

A new concept of molecular gastronomy with the exploding hot chocolate spheres! Using a blend of calcium lactate and sodium alginate, this technique encapsulates rich liquid chocolate inside a delicate sphere that would burst open when pressed against – a playful, exciting twist!

Served with a traditional Madeleine.

Topped with a house-made toasted marshmallow featuring rose and Cultivate’s smoky lapsang souchong tea, and rimmed with juniper sugar. Your choice of dairy, oat, soy or almond milk.

Served with a rose, juniper buttercream and chocolate mini cupcake topped with cracked black pepper and rose petals

Served with a chocolate buttercream mini cupcake with rainbow sprinkles

drinks.name: Hong Kong Classics: Sweet Almond Tea (白朱古力杏仁茶)

Rich almonds and apricot kernels blended with creamy Cacao Barry 34% Zephyr white chocolate with a sprinkling of kinako.

Served with a traditional Chinese almond cookie.

drinks.name: Hong Kong Classics: Mango Pudding (芒果布丁奶朱古力)

Sweet mango blended with Cacao Barry 41% Alunga milk chocolate, with evaporated milk cream top. 

Served with a mochi mango muffin.

A rich Biscoff hot chocolate crowned with an edible chocolate nest, gold flakes and golden chocolate egg. Survive the Canada Place geese, and it’s all yours!

Served with a rich fudge brownie to level up the chocolate indulgence.

drinks.name: Icelandic Molten Mocha

Our tribute to the land of fire and ice: a tiramisu-flavoured white hot chocolate topped with a whipped cream volcano and espresso drizzle.

Served with a mini ladyfinger cookie drizzled with espresso sauce, perfect for dunking.

drinks.name: Choconana
drinks.description:
Rich 56% Latin American dark chocolate meets our house-made fresh banana puree. This decadent drink offers a perfectly balanced sip of sweet banana and velvety cocoa.

Complete your treat with Fufú’s twist on New York Banana Pudding. This delightful side is topped with crunchy wafer cookie bits and rich dark chocolate bark.

drinks.name: Yuzu Hoji Forest

Creamy milk chocolate and roasted hōjicha meet bright yuzu purée. This unique hot drink is finished with yuzu whipped cream and a dusting of pink peppercorn for a perfect sip.

Complete your treat with our Yuzu Almond Financier. This classic French mini cake features rich brown-butter and nutty almond flavour brightened with a hint of citrus.

drinks.description:
Classic dark hot chocolate.

drinks.name: Mexican Diablo Hot Chocolate

“Devil’s” hot chocolate with hints of chili, cinnamon, cayenne and warm spices.

drinks.name: Exotic Durian White Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
White hot chocolate made with exotic fruit, durian cream.

drinks.name: Sogno Fiorito
drinks.description:
A creamy ruby chocolate drink with a hint of elderflower, topped with whipped cream and a rose petal.

Served with a canestrelli (Italian shortbread cookie).

drinks.name: Bacio di Zenzero
drinks.description:
A hint of ginger mixed with the signature Kitchen Table Group dark cocoa blend, topped with house-made orange whipped cream.

Served with a mini candied ginger biscotti.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Big Bang Brownie
drinks.description:
Dark chocolate hot chocolate with dark chocolate whipped cream. Garnished with rainbow candy-covered chocolate chips

On the side, a mini fudge brownie with chocolate ganache.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: Snap, Crackle, Cocoa
drinks.description:
Crispy rice cereal-infused Callebaut milk chocolate hot chocolate.

Topped with a brown-butter Rice Krispie marshmallow treat.

drinks.name: When Figs Fly
drinks.description:
Dark chocolate hot chocolate with spiced fig preserves.

Served with house-made fig newtons.

drinks.name: Ready Teddy
drinks.description:
Graham cracker-infused milk chocolate topped with cinnamon whipped cream.

Served with house-made mini bear-shaped cookies.

drinks.name: The Story of Gianduja – A Taste of Italian Magic
drinks.description:
Born in the 19th century on the cobblestone streets of Turin, Gianduja is the legendary love affair between rich chocolate and toasted hazelnuts. Today, a centuries-old Italian tradition gets a playful, GOOD (and local) makeover in this milky dark hot chocolate!

Our dark chocolate base stays unmatched: single-origin, organic, fair, refined-sugar free, lightly-roasted for a ‘no bitter distraction’ experience, and finished with a hint of Salt Spring Island Sea Salt. We won’t try to convince you of the chocolate-hazelnut combination – Gianduja already did that centuries ago! But we will make this experience NEW, incredibly mouthwatering, interactive, and absolutely irresistible for you – without a massive sugar crash shortly after, promise.

All of this because the best stories are the ones you get to taste. Come taste The Story of Gianduja and discover the remarkable history behind this timeless combo!

Served with a waffle brioche slathered in house-made chocolate-hazelnut spread and topped with caramelized hazelnut crunch.

Contains nuts. Organic.

drinks.name: Prairie to Plate – Saskatoon Berry Juniper
drinks.description:
What, you’ve never tasted a Saskatoon Berry?! Wild Saskatoon berries have been Canada’s best-kept secret for thousands of years – a sweet, purple treasure thriving across our prairies long before imported superfoods became trendy. Prairie to Plate is a tribute to this incredible berry that certainly deserves a moment to shine here at HCF!

We’ve paired it in a vegan dark hot chocolate with wild-foraged juniper to keep the foresty vibes going. The Saskatoons bring their distinctive sweet-almond notes (they’re actually pomes, like tiny apples!), while juniper adds fresh, botanical brightness. Think: A cozy cabin in the Canadian wilderness meets sophisticated botanical cocktail culture!

While the world obsesses over imported superfoods, we’re supporting Canadian farmers and flavours that have nourished Indigenous communities for centuries.

On the side, Saskatoon Berry Chocolate Ganache & Crispy gluten-free pretzel sticks perfect for dipping and sharing – because the best Canadian experiences are the ones you share.

Dairy-free, vegan, organic, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: A Yuzu Passion Fruit Staycation
drinks.description:
Escape winter’s grip with our Yuzu Passion Fruit Staycation – where Japanese prized citrus treasure meets tropical paradise; it’s pure sunshine captured in a cup. This combination leaves you feeling like a sunny beach vacation. Right here in Vancouver… in February.

We’ve transformed our signature vegan white chocolate into a cup of nature’s most vibrant flavours. Yuzu, with fresh notes of lemon, lime, and mandarin, with delicate floral undertones, and passion fruit. FYI – the fruit is just as passionate as we are about our craft.

Our creamy coconut-based white hot chocolate stays true to our values – refined-sugar free, naturally sweetened with coconut sugar, and crafted with our signature ethical approach.

On the side, a house-made vegan yuzu coconut lemon square, rolled in toasted coconut flakes.

Dairy-free, vegan, gluten-free friendly.

Served with a bold, elevated rice crispy made with roasted black sesame, brown butter marshmallow, rizzled in dark chocolate, and topped with roasted white sesame. Deep, nutty, slightly savory, and insanely addictive.

drinks.name: Shall We Dip?

drinks.name: What’s the Plot?
drinks.description:
A 70% dark chocolate hot chocolate with buttery popcorn notes.

Paired with caramel-sweet popcorn atop your drink. A movie-night inspired cup!

drinks.name: Jack goes to the Woods
drinks.description:
An earthy dark chocolate infusion layered with umami depth from wild mushroom powder, topped with delicate shaved white button mushrooms – a wander through the woods in every sip.

Served with a dark chocolate mushroom bonbon made with infusing a wild mushroom powder into dark chocolate callets.

Gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: Jack and Doraemon
drinks.description:
Meet Jack and Doraemon, a cozy cup where bold dark chocolate meets the soft, dreamy sweetness of the Japanese Red Bean “anko”.

Served with Doraemon’s dorayaki with a twist – a dorayaki pancake filled with an orange dark chocolate hazelnut filling.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: That Flan-tastic Purple Yam
drinks.description:
Alfonso’s chocolate tablea steamed in taro milk and served in an ube ganache-coated cup. Topped with taro whipped cream and a caramel drizzle.

Served with a Filipino dessert trio: a mini ube cupcake, leche flan, and pandesal.

drinks.name: Tiki Torched Brûlée Bliss
drinks.description:
Alfonso’s chocolate tablea steamed in milk and served in a crème brûlée–coated cup. Topped with Chantilly cream and a caramelized (torched) crust.

Served with a fruit ensemble and a crème brûlée malasada.

drinks.name: Hot-Choc-Nana

Dark hot chocolate infused with our house-made banana cinnamon sauce. Topped with whipped cream, cocoa powder, chocolate shavings and a banana gummy on top.

Paired with two banana shortbread cookies with chocolate cream filling.

drinks.name: Wednesday’s Mood
drinks.description:
A rich, dark-hot chocolate infused with toasted black sesame paste and finished with black cocoa whipped cream.

Paired with a black sesame macaron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Enid’s Coconut Cloud
drinks.description:
A cozy, white-hot chocolate made with creamy coconut milk and finished with fluffy cotton candy on top.

Paired with a raspberry macaron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Kyoto Cherry Rose
drinks.description:
For this special hot chocolate drink, we roasted our cacao beans in-house, then de-shelled them and slowly stone ground them for 24 hours with cherry rose sencha tea to create a smooth dark chocolate with hints of rose and sweet cherry. It is topped with a house-made cherry rose cordial and rose petals.

Served with Cherry Blossom Sablé: weaving together blush-pink pickled cherry blossoms and preserved Montmorency cherries.

drinks.name: Velvet Blackberry Ember
drinks.description: Substitute 3% BC dairy milk or vegan cashew coconut ice cream upon request.

drinks.name: Sapphire Strawberry Fog
drinks.description:
This delightfully smooth Hot Chocolate Fest creation is a collab drink brought to you by KILLER ICE CREAM x OATSIDE, which brings the distinctive zest of a blue Earl Grey tea latte to fresh and fruity heights with real strawberry essence, sweetened with vanilla syrup and steamed with real milk or dark chocolate & OATSIDE oat milk, topped with real whip cream and sprinkles.

On the side, a sidecar sundae drizzled in milk or dark chocolate, topped with sprinkles and a toasted marshmallow.

Substitute 3% BC dairy milk or vegan cashew coconut ice cream upon request.

drinks.name: The Mystery Flotilla
drinks.description:
Back by popular demand, the mystery flavour challenge.  This vegan drink is made with dark chocolate and almond milk.

Paired with house-made vegan organic chai tea gelato sampler.

Dairy-free, vegan, organic, and gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts. Contains alcohol (optional).

Clues:

Daughter of moon, sister of sun… Veiled in velvet, a slow ember sleeps within,
breaths like a secret caught in summer light, blooming into a blushing sea.
She stirs, she glows, almost whispers her name. Then drifts back into silence, leaving only the skeleton of an old sun
where a warm, fleeting pulse lingers, as if her hidden flesh grows beneath the glow.

Sip carefully—
can you guess its name?

-Paul Dincer

Check Koko Monk’s website and in-store for contest details.

Flight of the week (Jan 24, Saturday only) will include: “Mystery Flotilla” in addition to two other unique HC flavours.

drinks.name: Midnight Snow

Paired with house-made organic vegan blueberry guava chocolate gelato taster.

Dairy-free, vegan, organic, and gluten-free friendly.

Snow falling. Silence stretched across the heavy forest. Passion fruit cuts through the darkness.
And Pink peppercorn like an imaginary mare sparks sharp, precise run to wrap your soul up…

A hidden treasure chest beneath the snow, waiting to be discovered in every sip.

-Paul Dincer

Flight of the Week (Saturday, Jan 31st and Feb 7th, only) will include “Midnight Snow” in addition to two other unique HC flavours.

drinks.name: A Non-conformist’s Plea for an Imaginary Summer
drinks.description:

Paired with house-made organic salted caramel gelato taster.

Gluten-free friendly, and organic.

Come raise a cup, celebrate, and carry a little sunshine from its last sip into your day.

This is our only party we will throw for Non-conformists’ Plea, come and say goodbye to her with us.

-Paul Dincer

Last Flight of the Festival (Feb 14th Saturday only) will include “ANCPFAIS” in addition to two other unique HC flavours.
