drinks.name: White Velvet (Vegan)
drinks.description:
Creamy vegan white chocolate made with almond milk, vanilla, cinnamon, and a hint of cardamom. Smooth, comforting, and dairy-free. Add up to 3 toppings at our buffet-style hot chocolate bar. 

Paired with a chocolate raspberry cookie (gluten-free and vegan).

Gluten-free, dairy-free, and vegan, available for cafe service only.
drinks.vendor: L’Orangerie Restaurant by L’Hermitage Hotel – NEW

drinks.name: Lavender Dream
drinks.description:
White chocolate blended with milk, vanilla, and a subtle hint of lavender, finished with a soft purple tone. Light, floral, and creamy. Add up to 3 toppings at our buffet-style hot chocolate bar.

Served with your choice of a mini pain au chocolat or a madeleine.

Cafe service only.
drinks.vendor: L’Orangerie Restaurant by L’Hermitage Hotel – NEW

drinks.name: Pink Phase
drinks.description:
Watch carefully as the soft pink milk bleeds away into a deep, rich hot chocolate. With a blend of tart strawberries, black tea and fragrant lychees that pair beautifully with a black chocolate ganache and a cloud of whipped cream, Pink Phase perfectly embodies the coming-of-age story we’re all so familiar with.

Served with a strawberry cookie chocolate bar.

drinks.name: Grounded in Kyoto
drinks.description:
Roasted green tea and soybean flour, sweetened delicately with brown sugar and topped with a decadent sea salt cream foam, Grounded in Kyoto invokes a memory of walking down a snowfallen path, clutching onto a hot cup of chocolate to warm frostbitten fingers.

Served with a hojicha sable sandwich.

drinks.name: Chocolat Épicé
drinks.description:
A 70 % dark chocolate with added notes of orange, citrus, cinnamon and salt, layered with chocolate Chantilly, cocoa nibs, cinnamon and orange curls.

Served with the limited edition Spiced Chocolate Marshmallow macaron – truly created by Ladurée to be paired with a Hot Chocolate!

 Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Nuage Rose
drinks.description:
Reminiscent of a pink cloud (Nuage Rose), this drink combines white chocolate, strawberry, vanilla, with a touch of elderflower layered with vanilla Chantilly, strawberry coulis and a touch of cotton candy.

The drink is served with a Ladurée limited edition cotton candy macaron.

Gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: L’Amandine & Fleur D’Oranger
drinks.description:
A 70% dark hot chocolate, almond milk, marzipan with added notes of orange blossom and citrus, layered with vanilla Chantilly and sprinkles of almond.

The drink is served with a choice of a Ladurée signature almond or orange blossom macaron.

Gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Bunny Butt White Rabbit Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A white hot chocolate that incorporates the nostalgic taste of white rabbit candy – can be made with either dairy or oat milk. Topped with a generous amount of torched marshmallow fluff in the shape of an adorable fluffy bunny butt!

Served with two mini Nutella taiyakis (fish-shaped waffles) on a skewer, perfect for dipping.

drinks.name: Get That Banana Bread Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Your favourite banana bread meets a rich and creamy hot chocolate – can be made with either dairy or oat milk. Topped with a generous amount of torched marshmallow fluff!

Served with two mini Nutella taiyakis (fish-shaped waffles) on a skewer, perfect for dipping.

drinks.name: Pina Cocoalada Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
We’re bringing the tropical taste of Hawaii to Vancouver with a pineapple hot chocolate – can be made with dairy or oat milk. Topped with a generous amount of torched marshmallow fluff!

Served with two mini Nutella taiyakis (fish-shaped waffles) on a skewer, perfect for dipping.

drinks.name: Mary Had A Little Lamington
drinks.description:
Using a fave Aussie treat – the lamington – as inspiration, this dark chocolate, coconut and sponge cake drink is topped with vanilla whip and punctuated with a light raspberry coulis.

Served with a mini lamington – a classic sponge cake with a layer of house-made raspberry jam in the middle. Coated in chocolate icing and rolled in coconut shavings.

Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: Carrot Got Ya Tongue
drinks.description:
A dream white hot chocolate mixed with house-made carrot cake syrup, brimming with warm spices. Topped with a cream cheese whip.

Served with a carrot white chocolate cookie.

Vegan and gluten-free friendly options available upon request.

drinks.name: Jasmine Blossom
drinks.description:
Inspired by Dominique Ansel… we have crafted this white hot chocolate infused with jasmine tea specifically to create a blossoming marshmallow flower that blooms in your hot chocolate.

Served with a chocolate flowerpot.

Gluten-free friendly, dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: Malt, Stout & Bailey
drinks.description:
Another collab with a friend of the shop: SUBO BAKES. A sweet and malty dark-milk hot chocolate with a malty stout caramel and Baileys-inspired whip to pair with one of our favourite subobakes.

Served with a miniature chocolate-glazed stout loaf. Almost too adorable to eat.

Contains alcohol, but there is the option to have it without.

drinks.name: It’s The Vegans’ Turn! (Cookie Butter)
drinks.description:
A return of the favourite from last year… Biscoff cookie butter hot chocolate, but make it vegan! We make our own cookie butter, so why not?! This time it will be an oak milk chocolate Biscoff butter hot chocolate, spiced whip and cookie butter chocolate drizzle

Served with an ooey-gooey, rich and chewy chocolate borderline-brownie-kind-of-cookie.

Vegan.

drinks.name: Enzo Gorlomi
drinks.description:
Pistachio dark hot chocolate with ricotta whipped cream. It’s a cannoli in a mug.

Served with a fig and honey mini biscotti.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Fragnocci
drinks.description:
Hazelnut flavoured hot chocolate with pieces of fresh strawberries.

Served with balsamic strawberries with crushed hazelnut topping.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Holy Cocoa, Rosemary!
drinks.description:
A three-layer hot chocolate that combines dark chocolate ganache, salted rosemary caramel sauce and rosemary-vanilla whipped cream.

On the side, a pecan, salted caramel truffle.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Chai Me Crazy
drinks.description:
A dessert drink that combines white chocolate, vanilla gelato and spiced masala chai.

On the side, a chai-vanilla truffle.

drinks.name: London Snow
drinks.description:
A decadent hot chocolate infused with our house-steeped Earl Grey milk, blending rich cocoa with delicate bergamot notes. Finished with a cloud of Earl Grey cream foam flash-cooled in liquid nitrogen.

Served with an Earl Grey Ice Cream Sandwich.

drinks.name: Purple Dinosaur
drinks.description:
A creamy blend of ube and white chocolate mixed with Milo milk. Finished with silky Milo cold cream foam.

Paired with an Ube Ice Cream Sandwich.

drinks.name: Rummy Banoffee Toffee
drinks.description:
A decadent balance of medium dark chocolate infused with banana and house-made toffee, finished with a seasonally fit rum whip.

Served with a levelled-up shortbread: whole wheat sable topped with Maldon salt.

Contains alcohol.

drinks.name: Champorado Cocoa Meets Crispy Biko
drinks.description:
A spin on the Filipino savoury rice pudding, Champorado. Thick dark chocolate with puffed rice and coconut.

Served with a crispy biko-inspired rice krispie to dip.

drinks.name: Dubai Chocolate our Way
drinks.description:
Dark 64% chocolate flavoured with pure pistachio paste.

Served with a Dubai chocolate truffle with kataifi shredded dough and pure 100% pistachio paste.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Proudly Canadian
drinks.description:
Milk hot chocolate flavoured with maple syrup. Topped with maple leaf tuille.

Served with a house-made Nanaimo bar

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: An Italian Lost in Mexico
drinks.description:
A creamy, thick Italian hot chocolate made with Mexican cacao, cinnamon, and vanilla, and finished with a touch of orange zest.

Served with chocolate tacos filled with gold chocolate cream, a soft flourless sponge and crunchy praline nuts

drinks.name: Fig Me Up!
drinks.description:
Vegan dark chocolate gelato blended with our house-made fig confettura, creating a smooth, intense, and naturally fruity treat.

Served with a bignè filled with vanilla crema and raspberry confettura, finished with a crisp biscotto.

Dairy-free and vegan options available upon request.

drinks.name: “Butter Me Up” Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A decadent browned butter hot chocolate, made using high-quality grass-fed butter.

Served with browned butter blondie.

drinks.name: “Hot Date” Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Deliciously sweet hot chocolate made with date paste, no sugar here!

Served with a date, coconut and pecan cookie.

drinks.name: Strawberry Gochujang Hot Choco
drinks.description:
Sweet meets heat! A decadently rich hot chocolate infused with bold Korean gochujang and sweet strawberries.

Served with an iconic sweet Korean traditional snack with a geometric shape.

Please note that BYOC (Bring Your Own Cup) is required for to-go orders as part of our sustainability policy.

drinks.name: Shine Muscat Hot Choco
drinks.description:
Velvety hot chocolate infused with the floral sweetness of premium Shine Muscat grapes.

Served with a soft, buttery cookie dipped in sweet, aromatic Shine Muscat chocolate. The crisp edges and chewy center pair perfectly with the burst of fruity Shine Muscat flavour in every bite.

Please note that BYOC (Bring Your Own Cup) is required for to-go orders as part of our sustainability policy.

drinks.name: Oriental Bloom Hot Chocolate (Chrysanthemum Dark Hot Chocolate)
drinks.description:
A warm, floral blend made with chrysanthemum and rich dark chocolate. Topped with dried Osmantus flowers. Delicately aromatic with a gentle golden finish – comforting, elegant, and naturally soothing.

On the side is a Snowflake Crisp: a chewy nougat bar filled with crunchy cookies, nuts and dried fruit – all dusted in “snowflakes”.

Vegan, gluten-free friendly, contains nuts.

drinks.name: Blueberry Cloud Cocoa
drinks.description:
Rich dark chocolate topped with a soft, fruity blueberry cream crown.

On the side is a Snowflake Crisp: a chewy nougat bar filled with crunchy cookies, nuts and dried fruit – all dusted in “snowflakes”.

Vegan, gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Hojicha’s Lover
drinks.description:
Hojicha, with its warm, earthy (low in caffeine) flavour notes snuck out one night and secretly met matcha with its energizing and umami flavour, and they instantly knew that they would collide in a perfect romance. Our Sencha Hojicha has a naturally sweet and mild nutty flavour profile reminiscent of roasted chocolate and coffee, often with smoky or caramel undertones. Together, they decided they both loved chocolate, so the romance began over a bite of a Bak’d Matcha Latte Cookie.

Your side is the Bak’d ever popular ‘Matcha Latte Cookie’ made with premium matcha powder that gives each bite a vibrant green hue and a distinct, delicate flavour. The soft, chewy texture is perfectly balanced by the subtle sweetness that lets the rich, grassy notes of matcha shine through. Finished with a drizzle of white chocolate, this cookie is a must-try for matcha lovers and anyone seeking a refined, flavourful treat.

Dine-in only. Avalon milk is used in the drink, with dairy-free oat milk available upon request.

drinks.name: Grand Flame
drinks.description:
A dark and dangerously delicious Italian cocoa from world-famous chocolatier, Pernigotti, from Northwest Italy, with refreshing orange notes. For those choosing the spiked version, we set it on fire for you with Grand Marnier (cognac and bitter, orange-flavoured liqueur). We add a touch of Vancouver’s own world-famous, Canadian Champion, Maestro James, chocolate gelato (vegan option is available). Topped with orange foam, a slice of candied orange and a spritz of Italian Sicilian orange oil essence oil.

Served with our house-made Bigné or choux filled with our own 70% dark chocolate orange mousse cream topped with an orange-flavoured craquelin.

Dine-in only. Alcohol optional. Avalon milk is used in the drink.

drinks.name: Go Nuts!
drinks.description:
A warming and nutty combination of Texas pecans and Italian chocolate. Designed around Maestro James’ International Award-winning gelato flavour ‘Texas Pecan with Italian Soul’, we add our pecan paste for the depth, melted rich dark chocolate, a rim of Amarena sour cherry sauce and candied pecans on top of our Chantilly cream. We finish the show, topping it up with a scoop of our pecan gelato.

Accompanied by a house-baked dessert of warmed chocolate focaccia with a slathering of Nutella, crushed hazelnuts and well, go nuts, you’re going to want another! I doubt you’re going to share this with your bff!

Dine-in only. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Diablo Biscotti and Chocolate Elixir
drinks.description:
Thick and rich chocolate elixir.

Paired with a spicy Diablo chocolate biscotti.

Dairy-free.

drinks.name: Très Leche White Hot Chocolate with Caramel Foam Whip
drinks.description:
A white hot chocolate topped with a house-made caramel whip and caramel crunch.

Paired with a Creamy Tres Lèches frosted donut.

drinks.name: Chai White Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A rich chai-flavoured white chocolate beverage.

On the side, is a dulce de leche crème anglaise bomb, coated in white chocolate and topped with cookie crumble and shaved chocolate.

Dine-in only. Gluten-free option available (served without cookie crumble).

drinks.name: Chocolate Caliente with Horchata Cerveza
drinks.description:
A warm, comforting hot chocolate with a Mexican twist, infused with a reduction of Patina’s Horchata Cream Ale and finished with a touch of cinnamon for gentle spice and depth.

Served with a house-made ice cream sandwich layered with cajeta, a traditional Mexican caramel, then dipped in a horchata-chocolate coating. A cozy, indulgent treat with a playful, Mexican-inspired flair.

Dine-in only. Contains alcohol.

drinks.name: The Show Stopper
drinks.description:
Black forest-inspired hot chocolate combines a special house-made black cherry sauce, hot Monbana Supreme Chocolate, and a swirl of chocolate whipping cream for the ultimate indulgence.

Served with our signature PAUL Marshmallow Croissant Box — featuring toasted marshmallows, mini croissants, dark and ruby chocolate sauce, and a touch of black cherry sauce — this decadent pairing is crafted to truly steal the spotlight.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: The Tour de Paris
drinks.description:
An enchanting Parisian delight built on Monbana Supreme Chocolate infused with natural orange essence, layered with silky whipped cream.

Crowned with an edible tower of mini croissant, chouquette, macaron, and orange meringue.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: White Winter Dream
drinks.description:
A snowy fantasy in a cup — crafted with Monbana White Chocolate, served in a cup rimmed with melted white chocolate and coconut flakes

Topped with a swirl of whipping cream, toasted coconut, and a glistening Coconut Almond Chocolate Ball.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Tiramisu Affogato Royal
drinks.description:
A show-stopping fusion of Italy and France — a scoop of creamy Tiramisu Gelato crowned with a generous pour of hot Monbana Supreme Chocolate, melting into a luscious swirl of coffee, cocoa, and cream.

Finished with a dusting of cocoa powder, a swirl of whipped cream and a side of ladyfinger, it’s an elegant play between hot and cold.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: The Best Birthdays have Fairy Bread
drinks.description:
A birthday cake in a cup! Velvety vanilla bean white hot chocolate with frosted edges, cream and sprinkles.

Served with Fairy Bread – the taste of Australian birthday parties – soft white bread, a smear of butter, and a rainbow of sprinkles that remind you not to take life too seriously.

drinks.name: A Sticky Situation
drinks.description:
Like a sticky date pudding went skinny dipping in hot chocolate. Creamy hot chocolate infused with buttery caramel and dates.

Served with a classic slice of Sticky Date Pudding with warm caramel sauce.

drinks.name: Koko-Nutty Krabby Klassic
drinks.description:
Made with Cacao Barry 40% Ghana known for its fruity notes, pairs perfectly with our house-made toasted coconut syrup and topped with a pineapple-infused pillowy soft marshmallow square.

Served with a vanilla bean sponge crabby patty cupcake.

drinks.name: Ruby Reef Starfish Special
drinks.description:
Made with Callebaut Ruby Chocolate with torched house-made marshmallow cream topped with fresh whipped cream and freeze-dried sea foam candy.

Served with a mini vanilla glazed cake donut life preserver.

drinks.name: Horchata Inferno
drinks.description:
Valhrona chocolate unites with horchata, almond, cinnamon, and Mexican chilli to create a rich, gentle warmth. Finished with whipped cream and tangy tamarind caramel.

Served with a mini churro.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Silk Road Sip
drinks.description:
A luxurious fusion of French chocolate and invigorating Chinese five spice, enriched with coconut milk that enhances the blend’s aromatic sweetness.

Served with an edible red “envelope”.

drinks.name: Sweet n’ Cinnful
drinks.description:
A cinnamon-spiced hot chocolate topped with whipped cream and a salted caramel glaze.

Paired with our cinnaswirl blondie – a chewy cinnamon-spiced blondie with salted caramel swirled on top.

drinks.name: Nuts for You!
drinks.description:
Inspired by our famous Avalanche Bar, we have created a deliciously sweet peanut butter hot chocolate, topped with whipped cream and avalanche crumbs.

Paired with a peanut butter brownie.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: RohliCzech
drinks.description:
Traditional vanilla Czech walnut crescent (Rohlíček) made with Nut Hut walnuts in liquid form mixed with 55% chocolate. Cream infused with walnuts, tonka bean, vanilla sugar, lemon zest and a pinch of sea salt steamed together with chocolate. Topped with tonka whipped cream, crunchy grilias (a brittle made from caramelized sugar and walnuts) and a hint of lemon zest.

On the side, you’ll get our Czech walnut crescent in pastry form.  It is a tender, buttery pastry enriched with finely ground walnuts and finished with a veil of vanilla sugar.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Dark Current
drinks.description:
A 70 % dark chocolate meets the tartness of black currant with a hint of juniper, crafted by East Van Jam. It’s combined with thyme-infused cream, a pinch of sea salt, topped with thyme whipped cream, and finished with sugared thyme and freeze-dried currant dust.

Served with a traditional buttery Linz cookie filled with tart black currant jam and dipped in dark chocolate for a perfect sweet-tart balance.

drinks.name: The Big (Caramel) Apple Cocoa
drinks.description:
A cozy blend of our signature hot chocolate and the flavours of our Classic Caramel Apple. Rich chocolate meets smooth caramel and crisp apple notes.

Finished with a chocolate-dipped caramel marshmallow on the side.

drinks.name: The Cookie Butter Club
drinks.description:
Creamy cookie butter stirred into our signature hot chocolate for a warm, spiced and ultra-comforting sip.

Served with a chocolate-dipped caramel marshmallow on the side.

drinks.name: Pandan Paradise Duo
drinks.description:
This drink (and combo) can be best described as an experimental take on a classic. We created a pandan white chocolate paste, mixed that with your milk of choice and topped it with ube-coated shredded coconut.

On the side is another experimental take on a classic: a marbled ube pandan shortbread cookie.

drinks.name: Mighty Thai Tea
drinks.description:
Taking the bold taste of Thai tea and mixing it with a high-quality chocolate sauce to create a velvety new take on a hot chocolate, it is then topped with a Thai tea dust.

Served with a sesame cookie.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Fico e Timo
drinks.description:
Thyme meets fig and dark chocolate. A rich blend with a touch of salt to balance the tangy and sweet notes of this drink.

Served with an Almond Cantucci.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Frutti di Bosco
drinks.description:
Dark chocolate and mixed berries make this drink a true dessert. Made with coconut milk and topped with coconut whipped cream. A vegan treat in a cup.

Served with a Vegan Strawberry Meringue.

Dairy-free and vegan.

drinks.name: Toasty Caramel Oolong Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Rich hot chocolate blended with fragrant roasted Oolong (Da Hong Pao) tea and caramel cookie butter, topped with a burnt marshmallow and a premium chocolate caramel cookie from La Lula Pastries for extra texture and aroma.

Dine-in only.

drinks.name: Cheesy UBE Boba Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
A dreamy fusion of rich hot chocolate, chewy brown sugar pearls, and our signature UBE cheese foam — smooth, sweet, and slightly savoury.

Comes with a premium UBE butter cookie from La Lula Pastries for the perfect finish. A purple delight that warms the soul.

Dine-in only.

drinks.name: Meringue My Day
drinks.description:
The perfect fusion of our homemade creamy white chocolate, infused with vibrant lemon zest, and crowned with a fluffy layer of our signature house meringue.

Served with our classic lemon meringue tart — golden crust, vibrant lemon curd, and perfectly toasted meringue.

drinks.name: Berry Good Time
drinks.description:
An irresistible fusion of raspberry, coconut, and rich dark chocolate, perfectly layered with cream cheese whipped cream and a sprinkle of graham cracker crumbs, capturing the essence of a perfect cheesecake slice.

Served with our famous Bird’s Nest Cookie — a sweet, buttery coconut cookie topped with our signature homemade raspberry jam nestled in the center.

drinks.name: The Royal Mess
drinks.description:
A white hot chocolate infused with strawberry, topped with shaved meringue and freeze-dried strawberries. Inspired by the classic Eton Mess dessert.

Served with a strawberry macaron.

Contains nuts.

drinks.name: Prohibition
drinks.description:
A dark hot chocolate infused with bourbon, topped with smoked caramel whipping cream.

Served with a dark chocolate cigar filled with 70% bourbon-infused ganache.

Gluten-free friendly, contains alcohol.

drinks.name: Maple Me Crazy!
drinks.description:
A 48% milk hot chocolate infused with Maple Chantilly and a touch of sea salt.

Served with brown butter walnut cake.

Gluten-free friendly option available upon request.

drinks.name: Apple-y Ever After
drinks.description:
Warm cinnamon roasted apple infused in white hot chocolate.

Served with a mini apple pie.

Gluten-free friendly option available upon request.

drinks.name: Potato Chip Crunch
drinks.description:
A sweet and salty hot chocolate served in a cup rimmed with dark chocolate and crushed potato chips. Topped with chocolate whipped cream and sea salt.

Served with a classic chocolate chip cookie riddled with potato chips, topped with a sprinkle of sea salt.

Dairy-free and vegan.

drinks.name: Choca-Cherry Cola
drinks.description:
Cherry cola hot chocolate with a beautiful light pink whip (naturally coloured) and a cherry on top.

Paired with a decadent cola brownie.

Dairy-free and vegan.

drinks.name: Heavenly Heat
drinks.description:
Aji Amarillo (Peruvian pepper), mango and white chocolate create a flavour rollercoaster in your mouth that will at once surprise and delight you.

Served with a mango pâte de fruit coated in Tajin spice.

drinks.name: Kinako Sky
drinks.description:
Toasted kinako (soybean powder), dark chocolate, and bananas meld together, creating a rich, roasty and comforting drink.

Served with a mini layered banana cake with Kinako-chocolate mousse.

drinks.name: Cereal Daydream
drinks.description:
Velvety milk chocolate blended with nutty tahini and the nostalgic sweetness of cereal-infused milk, creating a smooth, dreamy indulgence.

Served with a buttery, crispy, umami cornflake sesame cookie.

drinks.name: Strawberry Clouds
drinks.description:
Creamy white chocolate infused with tart strawberry and a whisper of cotton candy — like tasting a cloud of nostalgia in every sip.

Served with a delicate cream puff filled with cotton candy strawberry cream.

drinks.name: Campfire Crush
drinks.description:
A rich cookie butter hot chocolate that tastes like nostalgia by the fire — creamy, spiced, and topped with a toasted S’mores cookie. Sweet, smoky, and a little bit flirty.

The S’mores cookie is a buckwheat cookie topped with a housemade toasted marshmallow.

May contain nuts.

drinks.name: Fireside Cream
drinks.description:
Decadent white hot chocolate with custard and caramel notes. Sweet, indulgent, and utterly dreamy.

Your goodie crowns the drink: toasted panna cotta nestled in a sweet cookie.

May contain nuts.

drinks.name: Red Velvet Affair
drinks.description:
This indulgent hot chocolate blends the bold richness of Township 7 Merlot with aromatic 70% Fleur de Cao dark chocolate and creamy Avalon Dairy milk. Infused with Uganda vanilla and a touch of Vancouver Island smoked sea salt, this decadent creation is finished with house-made whipped cream and a dusting of freeze-dried blackberry powder. It’s an elegant tribute to B.C.’s vineyards and artisan producers.

On the side, creamy cranberry goat cheese served with crisp artisan crackers, a perfect balance to the bold richness of the Red Velvet Affair. The cheese’s tang and subtle sweetness complement the merlot-chocolate’s depth while refreshing your palate between sips.

Contains alcohol.

drinks.name: Golden Whispers
drinks.description:
A decadent blend of Callebaut Belgian white chocolate, Avalon Dairy milk, delicately infused with Uganda vanilla, cream cheese, and caramel. Finished with a swirl of whipped cream, a drizzle of golden caramel, and a crumble of Biscoff cookies, it’s a silky, buttery dream inspired by classic cheesecake.

Served with a handcrafted sandwich of smooth Uno Gelato Vanilla Bean Gelato layered between two crisp Biscoff cookies. The gelato’s delicate sweetness and vanilla warmth harmonize with the spiced caramel tones of the Golden Whispers.

drinks.name: La Dolce Notte
drinks.description:
Indulge in the art of simplicity. La Dolce Notte is a silky vegan hot chocolate crafted with Belgian Dark 54% 811 Slab Vegan Chocolate and creamy oat milk, delicately infused with marzipan for a nutty, aromatic sweetness. Finished with a sprinkle of toasted sliced almonds, this creation is a warm invitation to slow down and savour the night.

Served with a little scoop of our Almond Lemon Siciliano Sorbetto — or a sorbetto of your choice, to brighten your palate with a refreshing citrus contrast that complements the drink’s deep, velvety richness.

Vegan, dairy-free, gluten-free friendly. Contains nuts.

drinks.name: What the Fudge (Cherry Edition)
drinks.description:
Rich cocoa meets a kiss of cherry — pure velvet in a cup.

Served with dark chocolate-dipped New York-style cheesecake truffles!

drinks.name: The White Key Lime Whisper
drinks.description:
Zesty lime meets silky white chocolate — sunshine in a mug.

Served with a lemon brulee square.

drinks.name: Hot-Ch-Ocotopus
drinks.description:
A decadent house-made chocolate syrup with steamed milk, whipped cream and chocolate sprinkles.  Served in an adorable souvenir take-home mug.

On the side, a handmade octopus sugar cookie.

drinks.name: Finding Cocoa
drinks.description:
Creamy peppermint white hot chocolate, topped with whipped cream and orange sprinkles. Served in Nemo’s own souvenir take-home mug.

Paired with a clownfish cookie.

drinks.name: Red Fortune Hot Chocolate
drinks.description:
Made with ruby chocolate and served with Mississippi chocolate cake.

Located in the USA Terminal, before security.
Operating hours: 6 a.m. to 10 p.m., daily
Instagram: fairmontvancouverairport

drinks.name: Glampfire Sweetgrass Hot Chocolate with a HYPE Huckleberry S’more
drinks.description:
This dark, sweetgrass-smoked hot chocolate, made for us by HYPE, will pair nicely with a s’more made with a maple graham cracker, marshmallow with a huckleberry jelly inside, and coated in HYPE Chocolate.

Located in the International Terminal near Gate D71, after security
Operating hours: 7 a.m. to 9:30 p.m., daily
Instagram: snbonthefly

drinks.name: Elderflower Noir Cocoa
drinks.description:
Real dark Callebaut chocolate infused with elderflower and garnished with chocolate curls and dried flowers. Served with a mini vanilla shortbread cookie.

Located in the Domestic Arrivals Terminal, Level 2, before security
Operating hours: 8 a.m. to 8 p.m., daily
Instagram: paperplanescafe

drinks.name: Mocha & Morsel
drinks.description:
White chocolate mocha with an almond shortbread cookie.

Contains nuts. 

Located near Gate C45 and E88, after security
Operating hours: 6:30 a.m. to 10:30 p.m., daily

drinks.name: Matcha Moonlight
drinks.description:
White hot chocolate, kinako latte with a black sesame milk tea cookie.

Located at Domestic Departures, before security
Operating hours: 7 a.m. to 7 p.m., daily
Instagram: paragontearoom

drinks.name: Sweet n Cinnful and #189 – Nuts for You!
drinks.description:
Purebread is participating in the full festival at 5 locations in total. Click here to view their vendor page.

Located in the International Terminal, before security
Operating hours: 5 a.m. to 9 p.m., daily

drinks.name: Big MAC
drinks.description:
Toasted, house-made macadamia nut praline with our custom house-made hot chocolate blend of dark chocolate, cinnamon, whipping cream, sugar, and milk, all steamed together and frothed to order. Topped with a light white chocolate foam and ground toasted macadamia nuts to finish.

Served with a macadamia white chocolate cookie.

drinks.name: S’morsgasbord
drinks.description:
Our delicious, thick hot chocolate base, made in-house with cinnamon, sugar, whipping cream, milk and dark chocolate. Topped with a marshmallow foam that we will roast in front of you!

Served with a garnish of our sweet honey graham cracker.

Dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: Umaji-mura – The Yuzu Forest
drinks.description:
A creamy matcha white chocolate oatmilk latte with a white chocolate dipped rim, topped with a cloud of yuzu-infused vegan whip.

On the side, crafted by our talented friends at Level V Bakery, is a Yuzu cream puff dipped in rich matcha white chocolate. This dreamy set is perfectly balanced, not too sweet, and made entirely from 100% plant-based ingredients (as always). Themed merch is also available at the café throughout the Hot Chocolate Festival.

In May 2025, we had the chance to visit Umaji-mura, a tiny village tucked away in Shikoku, Japan – famous for its vibrant yuzu orchards and exceptional yuzu juice. We were completely enchanted by the lush scenery surrounding the factory, the crisp brightness of the fruit, and the warmth of the people who welcomed us. Inspired by that visit, we wanted to bring a taste of Umaji-mura to you – in hot chocolate form.

Dairy-free and vegan.

drinks.name: Hojicha Murasaki
drinks.description:
This combination has been the most requested one since we opened, and we’re excited to make it happen through the Hot Chocolate Festival. Hojicha Murasaki is a soothing hojicha white chocolate oat milk latte with real purple yam paste, served in a cup dipped in sweet UBE white chocolate, and topped with a cloud of velvety UBE whip.

Paired with a delicate hojicha black sesame tart (gf), this drink brings together two earthy flavours so harmoniously — the warm, nutty, and slightly smoky notes of roasted hojicha and the subtly sweet, nutty richness of vibrant purple ube.

Dairy-free, vegan, and gluten-free friendly.

drinks.name: Lost Love Raspberrilicious Hot Chocolate Affogato
drinks.description:
The main attraction is a scoop of our handmade raspberry sorbetto swimming in bold espresso and topped with our vanilla whipped cream and fresh raspberry coulis.

Paired with rich, dark hot chocolate on the side.

Available for cafe service only.  Gluten-free friendly, dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: Hot Cocoa-Lanche
drinks.description:
Everything you want in a hot chocolate, just more, and more and more. Big enough to share, too good to give up! We are not re-inventing the wheel here, but this rich classic favourite is sure to please.

Served with an avalanche of toasted marshmallows on top. We won’t tell you how we make it, but it may just be your favourite hot chocolate ever.

Available for cafe service only.  Gluten-free friendly, dairy-free option available upon request.

drinks.name: Cinna-Da-Bom Sticky Bun Hot Cocoa
drinks.description:
This is our most insane creation yet. We soak a beautiful, fresh cinnamon bun in hot chocolate, fudge and caramel. Top it with whipping cream, Skor and throw on more chocolate and caramel sauce. Think, everything hot chocolate but in edible form. It’s ooey gooey and so damn yummy!

This unique reverse combo serves up your hot chocolate as a mini side treat.

Available for cafe service only.
